findings.description: Pre-existing '*.lock' pattern on line 38 will cause pnpm-lock.yaml to be gitignored when Task 3 scaffolds the frontend. Lock files must be tracked for reproducible builds. This pattern was not introduced by Task 1, but Task 1 was the designated point to audit the existing .gitignore before appending. Recommendation: add '!frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml' negation in the Node/Nuxt section, or replace the pre-existing '*.lock' with more specific patterns (e.g. '*.lock.bak') that do not affect npm/pnpm lock files.

The '*.jar' pattern (line 47) is repo-wide and excludes any JAR placed outside backend/ (e.g. in scripts/ or infra/). The negation '!backend/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar' restores only one specific file. For this project's structure this is acceptable and consistent with standard Java gitignore conventions, but worth noting for future maintainers if JARs are ever added to non-backend directories.
